clause_anchor.span: Each Major Investor may receive monthly unaudited financial statements within 15 days after month-end and may inspect all Company books, records, source materials, employee communications, and facilities at any time without limitation.

deviations.original_text: Each Major Investor may receive quarterly unaudited financial statements within 45 days after quarter-end and annual audited financial statements within 120 days after fiscal year-end. Inspection access is limited to reasonable requests during normal business hours and remains subject to confidentiality, attorney-client privilege, trade-secret protection, legal compliance, and competitive-sensitivity limits.
deviations.mutated_text: Each Major Investor may receive monthly unaudited financial statements within 15 days after month-end and may inspect all Company books, records, source materials, employee communications, and facilities at any time without limitation.

clause_anchor.span: If a Major Investor proposes to transfer more than 10% of the shares held by that holder to a third party other than a Permitted Transferee, the other eligible holders may participate pro rata in the proposed transfer on the same price and terms, but transfers by Founder Holders are excluded from tag-along rights.

deviations.original_text: If a Founder Holder or Major Investor proposes to transfer more than 10% of the shares held by that holder to a third party other than a Permitted Transferee, the other eligible holders may participate pro rata in the proposed transfer on the same price and terms.
deviations.mutated_text: If a Major Investor proposes to transfer more than 10% of the shares held by that holder to a third party other than a Permitted Transferee, the other eligible holders may participate pro rata in the proposed transfer on the same price and terms, but transfers by Founder Holders are excluded from tag-along rights.

clause_anchor.span: Each stockholder must provide any indemnity, escrow, holdback, non-compete covenant, or other seller obligation requested by the buyer as a condition to the drag-along.

deviations.original_text: No stockholder will be required to provide uncapped indemnity, non-pro rata liability, or a non-compete covenant as a condition to the drag-along.
deviations.mutated_text: Each stockholder must provide any indemnity, escrow, holdback, non-compete covenant, or other seller obligation requested by the buyer as a condition to the drag-along.

clause_anchor.span: The Board will consist of five directors: two Founder Designees selected by the Founder Holders, two Series A Designees selected by the Requisite Holders, and one independent director selected solely by the Series A Designees.

deviations.original_text: The Board will consist of five directors: three Founder Designees selected by the Founder Holders, one Series A Designee selected by the Requisite Holders, and one independent director approved by the Founder Designees and the Requisite Holders.
deviations.mutated_text: The Board will consist of five directors: two Founder Designees selected by the Founder Holders, two Series A Designees selected by the Requisite Holders, and one independent director selected solely by the Series A Designees.

distractors.span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
distractors.why_benign: The governing-law canary says Delaware law is acceptable for this engagement.

distractors.span: Any dispute arising under this Agreement will be resolved by confidential arbitration before JAMS, except that either party may seek temporary or preliminary injunctive relief in a court of competent jurisdiction.
distractors.why_benign: The dispute-resolution canary says confidential arbitration is acceptable for this engagement.

distractors.span: The Company has issued Common Stock and Series A Preferred Stock, and each holder agrees to exercise rights under this Agreement in good faith.
distractors.why_benign: Describing the capital structure and good-faith exercise of rights does not conflict with the company-side playbook.
